title: Emillio's Cobblemon
body:
# Emillio's Cobblemon Pack
A small cobblemon modpack with extra mods to enhance gameplay.
Includes a minimap, waystones, backpacks, sophisticated storage, ...

## Exploration
![A fisherman's hut from integrated stuctures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Unkxq2gE/images/33863c2e330dda83f394586b009d99877c27e870.png)

For exploration we added a minimap, waystones to teleport between, towers and structures to explore, Tempad's a teleporting device

## Storage
![Store items with Sophisticated Storage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Unkxq2gE/images/cb560914c5f661ccc9ce1cbd5a8b747066aaafd1.png)

For storage we added Sophisticated storage to store items in bulk, applied energistics the brain of your storage system, Backpacks to store your items on the go

## Farming and Cooking
![Cooking with Farmer's Delight](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Unkxq2gE/images/1fb6e20d2c702ab344ade440c86b55a22f2bc6db.png)
For farming we added multiple mods from the Let's Do it series like
- **Vinery**
- **Bakery**
- **Brewery**
  
But we also added Farmer's Delight and Slice and dice to enhance your cooking needs

## Tech and Magic
![Some machines from thermal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Unkxq2gE/images/46c592ba6723475298848f0f0555f42703c24b96.png)

The pack also contains some tech mods to make resources easier to gather.
_Like_: 
- **Create**: Tech but with rotation to enchance your builds and resources
- **thermal expansion**: Make machines that speed up your progress
- **Mistical aggriculture**: Create seeds that give you certain materials
- **Iron Jetpacks**: Create your own jetpacks to fly in the world

## Cobblemon Addons
![Mega charizard with a tower in the background](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Unkxq2gE/images/6b71e59b07d07a6ba52ba120411011aa17fac009.png)

We added some addons for cobblemon to enhance the base experience
- **Mega mons**: To mega evolve your cobblemons
- **Mass outbreaks**: Sometimes mass outbreaks occur spawner multiple of the same cobblemon
- **Cobbledex**: For having information about certain pokemon
- **Cobblepedia**: Displays information about items in game
- **Cobblemon Industrialized**: A combination of create and cobblemon allowing for automation of pokeballs etc
- **Spawn Notification**: Displays a notification when special cobblemon spawn

## _List of important mods_ 
- Applied Energistics
- Waystones
- Sophisticated Backpacks/Storage
- Cobblemon
- Create
- Thermal Dynamics 
- Bottany Pots 
- Farmer's Delight
- Mystical Aggriculture
